Tools

Interactive entry points

First-version tools are simple, readable, and designed for later database or account-system migration.

Type a dream symbol and get a calm interpretation.

Dream Journal Prompt Tool

Generate prompts to record details before interpreting.

Dream Theme Finder

Featured articles

How to read water dreams through emotion, movement, and setting.

Snake Dream Meaning Without Panic

Why snake dreams can mean fear, change, warning, or renewal depending on context.
Culture

Zhougong Dream Culture: A Modern English Guide

FAQ

Questions people ask before trusting the site

No. Dream symbols are interpretive prompts. Emotion, personal history, and recent events matter.
